expectations.text: Audit file is written to the plan folder (docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/) — not just printed to stdout
expectations.evidence: File written to docs/plans/drafted/ux-discovery-v2/audit/2026-06-26-codex.md (confirmed by agent report)

expectations.text: Output contains YAML frontmatter with a 'verdict' field set to READY, NEEDS REVISION, or NOT READY
expectations.evidence: Frontmatter present: audit-of, auditor, date, verdict: NEEDS REVISION, blocking-issues: 3, advisory-issues: 3

expectations.text: Prior art section references the expired ui-ux-discovery plan and mentions at least one specific prior finding (e.g., 269 raw hex values, 48 dead CSS classes, or token inventory)
expectations.evidence: Agent summary confirms 'baseline numbers (269 hex, 5 duplication groups) cited' and CSS modules rejection documented

expectations.text: Gate coverage table or section is present and correctly marks all 3 discovery sprints as N/A for code-modifying gates
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed 'gates correctly marked N/A with a reason'; excerpt shows ready-checklist item: 'Every code-modifying sprint has gate coverage (no sprints modify code; N/A is appropriate)'

expectations.text: Session start compliance is assessed — output mentions whether each sprint has a build-current-state.sh step
expectations.evidence: Found UX2-R2 missing verify-tooling-state.sh (blocking issue #1) and UX2-R3 missing session environment check entirely (blocking issue #2)

expectations.text: Any scripts referenced in the sprint files are verified against the actual scripts/agent/ directory contents (not assumed to exist)
expectations.evidence: Agent verified scripts exist; blocking issue #3 flags that src-structure-refactor expired plan paths are NOT confirmed to exist

expectations.text: Blocking issues section is present — either lists specific issues with evidence and fix, or explicitly states zero blocking issues with a reason
expectations.evidence: Blocking issues table with Sprint | Issue | Evidence | Fix columns; 3 issues each with specific file path, step number, and fix instruction
